candidates.why: Dedicated R&D expense above EBIT; should also be included in XSGA when separate so XSGA-XRD removes it.

variables.notes: Per hierarchy, selected the explicit populated SG&A row 'Selling and administrative expenses'. Also included the separate above-EBIT R&D line so that PROF can compute SG&A excluding R&D via (XSGA_COMPONENTS - XRD). Excluded restructuring subcomponents and 'Other operating expenses' to avoid one-off/non-SG&A items.
